_comment: Curated dedup clusters for W4-4C. Each cluster declares one canonical domain and >=1 aliases. The dedup-orgs.mjs script applies Day.ai's native canonical/alias relationships — aliases stay in the workspace (no data loss) but views auto-collapse to the canonical. Pre-seeded from the 2026-06-03 audit. Add new clusters as the org-hygiene runbook surfaces them.
